description: Logan (Infantry) + Gwen (Marksman) combo — both heroes fully deterministic (no chance skills), single run sufficient. Tests Infantry+Marksman DamageUp stacking for two of the highest-tier NC heroes. minxxx defends with Logan (S1=3/S2=3/S3=3) + Gwen (S1=1/S2=1/S3=0). First validation of Logan+Gwen interaction.
